---
title: "Comparaison des méthodes de calcul de la taille d’échantillon"
subtitle: "{{< fa brands r-project >}} comme alternative à East et nQuery"
format:
  clean-revealjs:
    title-slide-attributes:
        data-state: "hide-menubar"
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    menu: true
    section-divs: false
    margin: 0.12
    widescreen: true
    width: 1200
    theme: theme.scss
    incremental: true
    simplemenu:
        barhtml:
          header: 
            "<div class='menubar'>
              <a href='#'>
                <img class='logo' src='../SCC-HexSticker.png' width='70' style='margin:0px 10px'>
              </a>
              <ul class='menu'></ul>
            <div>"
        scale: 0.60
mermaid-format: svg
revealjs-plugins:
  - simplemenu
author:
  - name: Arocena Thomas
    orcid: 0009-0002-7014-220X
    email: arocena.thomas@gmail.com
    role: "Stagiaire"
    affiliations: Oncostat
  - name: Dan Chaltiel
    email: dan.chaltiel@gustaveroussy.fr
    orcid: 0000-0003-3488-779X
    role: "Encadrant"
  - name: Anne Lourdessamy
    email: anne.lourdessamy@gustaveroussy.fr
    orcid: 0009-0006-9051-3302
    role: "Encadrante"
date: last-modified
lang: fr
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
source("presentation-setup.R")
theme_set(theme_clean())
```


<!-- # Introduction {background-color="#202B3E"} -->
# Introduction {data-stack-name="Introduction"}

## Motivations
### Pourquoi utiliser {{< fa brands r-project >}} pour le calcul de la taille d’échantillon ?

- Calcul dans {{< fa brands r-project >}} (pas d’outil externe)
- Partage et reproductibilité via le code
- Pas de problèmes d’export / interopérabilité
- Logiciel libre et open-source (audit, collaboration, {{< fa brands github >}})

::: {.fragment}
→ Nécessité de valider les packages {{< fa brands r-project >}} pour atteindre la crédibilité de logiciels comme East ou nQuery.
:::

## Présentation des Logiciels et package 


## Périmètre de la comparaison
### Designs d’essai clinique parcourus
```{mermaid}
---
config:
  theme: neutral
---
flowchart TB
  A["Essai"] --> AB["Binaire"]
    AB --> ABA["2-bras"]
      ABA --> ABAA["Fixe"]
        ABAA --> ABAAA(["Calcul exact"])
        ABAA --> ABAAB(["Test Z-pooled"])
        ABAA --> ABAAC(["Test Z-unpooled"])
      ABA --> ABAB["Group-sequential"]
        ABAB --> ABABA(["Test Z-pooled"])
    AB --> ABB["1-bras"]
      ABB --> ABBA(["Calcul exact"])
      ABB --> ABBB(["Approximation normale"])
  A --> AA["Survie"]
    AA --> AAA["2-bras"]
      AAA --> AAAA(["Fixe"])
      AAA --> AAAB(["Group-sequential"])
    AA --> AAB(["1-bras"])

```

## Périmètre de la comparaison
### Méthodes évaluées selon le type d’essai

::: {style="font-size: 85%;"}

| Critère | Type d'essai                  | Méthode    | Logiciels    | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Survie  | 2 bras, fixe                  | —          | East, nQuery | Rpact, Rashnu, gsDesign2            |
| Survie  | 1 bras, fixe                  | —          | nQuery       |oa2s^[OneArm2stage], sssas^[SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival], Rashnu|
| Survie  | 2 bras, group-sequential      | —          | East         | Rpact, gsDesign2                    |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East, nQuery | bbssr                               |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Pooled     | East, nQuery | Rpact, bbssr                        |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Unpooled   | East, nQuery | —                                   |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East         | A’Hern (sans package)               |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Approx. norm| East, nQuery | Rpact                               |
| Binaire | 2 bras, group-sequential      | Pooled     | East         | Rpact                               |

:::

# Critères binaires {data-stack-name="Binaires"}

```{mermaid}
---
config:
  theme: neutral
---
flowchart TB
  AB["Binaire"] --> ABA["Deux bras"]
    ABA --> ABAA["Fixe"]
      ABAA --> ABAAA(["Calcul exact"])
      ABAA --> ABAAB(["Test Z-pooled"])
      ABAA --> ABAAC(["Test Z-unpooled"])
    ABA --> ABAB["Séquentiel en groupes"]
      ABAB --> ABABA(["Test Z-pooled"])
  AB --> ABB["Un bras"]
    ABB --> ABBA(["Calcul exact"])
    ABB --> ABBB(["Calcul approché"])

```

<!-- ## Quick theorical background
### Required input

Pour calculer le nombre d’événements nécessaire :

- $\alpha$, erreur de type I
- Puissance ($1-\beta$)
- Proportion du groupe contrôle $\pi_c$
- Proportion du groupe expérimental $\pi_e$ -->

## Tests pour critères binaires
### Pooled/Unpooled, Fisher exacte

::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
- Z-test
  - Pooled variance :
    $$
    Z = \frac{\hat{p}_1 - \hat{p}_2}{\sqrt{\hat{p}(1-\hat{p}) \left(\frac{1}{n_1} + \frac{1}{n_2}\right)}}, \quad
    \hat{p} = \frac{x_1 + x_2}{n_1 + n_2}
    $$
  - Unpooled variance :
    $$
    Z = \frac{\hat{p}_1 - \hat{p}_2}{\sqrt{\frac{\hat{p}_1(1-\hat{p}_1)}{n_1} + \frac{\hat{p}_2(1-\hat{p}_2)}{n_2}}}
    $$
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
- Fisher exact test

  - Probabilité exacte des tables 2×2 :
    $$
    P = \frac{\binom{n_1}{x_1}\binom{n_2}{x_2}}{\binom{n_1+n_2}{x_1+x_2}}
    $$
  - Utile pour petits effectifs (pas d'approximation normale)
  - Pas de formule analytique
:::
::::
:::

## Paramètres

| Paramètre                           | Valeurs testées         |
| ------------------------------------| ----------------------- |
| Proportion contrôle $\pi_c$         | 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.8, 0.9 |
| Delta de proportion $\pi_e - \pi_c$ | 0.05, 0.15, 0.25, 0.49  |
| $\alpha$ (2-sided)                  | [0.01]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.05]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.1]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.20]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.49]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|
| Puissance (1-$\beta$)               | [0.51]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}, [0.8]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.9]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.99]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|

::: {style="font-size: 50%;"}
[pertinent]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [peu pertinant]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [cas limite]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}
:::


## Essai à 2 bras fixe
### Méthodes comparées

::: {style="font-size: 85%;"}
| Critère | Type d'essai                  | Méthode    | Logiciels    | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East, nQuery | bbssr                               |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Pooled     | East, nQuery | Rpact, bbssr                        |
| Binaire | 2 bras, fixe                  | Unpooled   | East, nQuery | —                                   |
:::

::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- East: Difference of Proportions test [PN-2S-DI]
- nQuery : PTT36 / Inequality Tests for Difference of Two Proportions

:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
bbssr::BinarySampleSize()
rpact::getSampleSizeRates()
```
:::

## Essai à 2 bras fixe
### Résultats en pooled

```{r}
#| label: nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled
nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled <- 
  ssc$bin$fixed_pooled$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled, title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance")
```
::: 
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled)
#| fig-height: 7
plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_pooled, title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance")
```
:::
:::
::::

## Essai à 2 bras fixe
### Résultats en exact

```{r}
#| label: nr_bin_2_fixed_exact
nr_bin_2_fixed_exact <- 
  ssc$bin$fixed_exact$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  mutate(
    relevancy = case_when(
        alpha > 0.2 | power < 0.6 | power >= 0.99 ~ "low",
        alpha > 0.02 & alpha < 0.15 & power > 0.75  ~ "high",
        .default = "medium"
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(relevancy = fct_relevel(relevancy, c("high", "medium", "low"))) |> 
  get_n_ratio()
```

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact)
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact, title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, exact")
```
::: 
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| label: plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact)
#| fig-height: 7
plot_n_ratio(nr_bin_2_fixed_exact, title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, exact")
```
:::
:::
::::


## Essai à 2 bras fixe
### Résultats en pooled

```{r}
bin_fixed_pooled <- ssc$bin$fixed_pooled$combined
bin_fixed_exact <- ssc$bin$fixed_exact$combined
tbl_exact <- get_tbl(bin_fixed_exact) |> 
  mutate(
  relevancy = case_when(
      alpha > 0.2 | power < 0.6 | power >= 0.99 ~ "low",
      alpha > 0.02 & alpha < 0.15 & power > 0.75  ~ "high",
      .default = "medium"
  )) |> 
  mutate(relevancy = fct_relevel(relevancy, c("high", "medium", "low")))
tbl_pooled <- get_tbl(bin_fixed_pooled)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
n_ratios_pooled <-
  tbl_pooled |> 
  drop_na(n_east) |> 
  mutate(
    rpact = n_rpact/n_east,
    nquery = n_nquery/n_east,
  ) |> 
  select(-c("n_rpact", "n_nquery")) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("rpact", "nquery"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "n_ratio"
  )

nr_bin2_fixed_pooled <- 
  ssc$bin$fixed_pooled$combined |> 
  get_tbl() |> 
  get_n_ratio()

n_ratios_exact <-
  tbl_exact |> 
  drop_na(n_east) |> 
  mutate(
    bbssr = n_bbssr/n_nquery,
    east = n_east/n_nquery,
  ) |> 
  select(-c("n_east", "n_bbssr")) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("bbssr", "east"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "n_ratio"
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio_pooled <-
  n_ratios_pooled |> 
  group_by(relevancy, method)  |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 2))) |>
  gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  gt_theme_clean() |> 
  # gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance",
    subtitle = "Par rapport aux valeurs de East"
  ) |>  
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |>  
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#ffa194ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("low")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#f0e292ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#a7ffc4ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio_exact <-
  n_ratios_exact |> 
  group_by(relevancy, method)  |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |> 
  gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes par rapport aux valeurs de East"
  ) |>  
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |>  
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#ffa194ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("low")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#f0e292ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#a7ffc4ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  )
```

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| tbl-widths: 9
gt_ratio_pooled
```
::: 
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| fig-height: 7
p <- 
  ggplot(n_ratios_pooled) +
  aes(x = n_east, y = n_ratio, color = method) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1 - er_rate, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1 + er_rate,  linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance",
    subtitle = "Par rapport à East",
    x = "N East",
    y = "N-Ratio"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_color_clean() +
  facet_relevancy()

p
```
:::

:::

::::

## Test

```{r}
#| fig-height: 7
p <- nr_bin2_fixed_pooled |> 
  plot_n_ratio(title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance")

p
```

## Test 2

```{r}
nr_bin2_fixed_pooled |> 
  gt_n_ratio(title = "N-Ratio Binaire à 2-Bras fixe, pooled-variance")
```

## Essai à 2 bras fixe
### Résultats en exact I

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
gt_ratio_exact
```
:::

:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
p <- ggplot(n_ratios_exact) +
  aes(
    x = n_nquery,
    y = n_ratio,
    color = method,
    "alp" = alpha, 
    "power" = power,
    "pi_c" = pi_c,
    "delta_pi" = delta_pi) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap( ~ relevancy, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Sample size de East", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1")

plotly::ggplotly(p, width = 750, height = 500)
```
:::

:::

::::

## Essai à 2 bras fixe
### Résultats en exact II

```{r}
n_exact_relevant <- 
  n_ratios_exact |> 
  filter(
    relevancy == "high",
    n_nquery > 5,
    n_nquery < 200,
    delta_pi != 0.49
  )
```

```{r}
gt_ratio_exact <-
  n_exact_relevant |> 
  group_by(method)  |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |> 
  gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes par rapport aux valeurs de East"
  )
```

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
gt_ratio_exact
```
:::
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
p <- ggplot(n_exact_relevant) +
  aes(x = n_nquery, y = n_ratio, color = method) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap( ~ relevancy, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Sample size de East", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1")

plotly::ggplotly(p, width = 750, height = 500)
```
:::
:::
::: 

## Essai à 2 bras séquentiel en groupes
### Méthodes comparées

| Critère | Type d'essai                  | Méthode    | Logiciels    | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Binaire | 2 bras, séquentiel en groupes | Pooled     | East         | Rpact                               |


::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- East: Difference of Proportions test [PN-2S-DI]

:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeRates()
```
:::

## Two-Arms group sequential design
### Results I

```{r}
#| echo: false
bin_gs <- get_tbl(ssc$bin$gs$combined)
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
n_ratios <-
  bin_gs |> 
  drop_na(n_east) |> 
  mutate(
    rpact = n_rpact/n_east,
  ) |> 
  select(-n_rpact)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio <-
  n_ratios |> 
  group_by(relevancy) |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(rpact, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(rpact, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(rpact, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(rpact, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(rpact, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(rpact, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |>
  gt(groupname_col = "relevancy") |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "Proportions Rpact/East",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East"
  ) |>  
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |>  
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#ffa194ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("low")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#f0e292ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#a7ffc4ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  )
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio
```
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
p <- 
  ggplot(n_ratios) +
  aes(x = n_east, y = rpact) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap( ~ relevancy, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East",
    x = "Sample size de East",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1")

plotly::ggplotly(p, width = 750, height = 500)
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

## Essai à 1 bras
### Méthodes comparées

::: {style="font-size: 85%;"}
| Critère | Type d'essai                  | Méthode    | Logiciels    | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Exacte     | East         | A’Hern (sans package)               |
| Binaire | 1 bras, fixe                  | Approchée  | East, nQuery | Rpact                               |
:::
::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- East : Single Proportion test [PN-1S-SP]
- nQuery : POT0 / Chi Square Test for One Proportion

:::

::: {.fragment}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeRates(group = 1)
```
:::

##  Essai à 1 bras
### Résultat en approchée

```{r}
bin_one_arm_pooled <- get_tbl(ssc$bin$one_arm_pooled$combined) 
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
n_ratios <-
  bin_one_arm_pooled |> 
  drop_na(n_east) |> 
  mutate(
    nquery = n_nquery/n_east,
    rpact = n_rpact/n_east
  ) |> 
  select(-c("n_nquery", "n_rpact")) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("nquery", "rpact"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "n_ratio"
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio <-
  n_ratios |> 
  group_by(relevancy, method)  |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |> 
  gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "N Ratio 1-Bras",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de nQuery"
  ) |>  
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |>  
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = color_low)
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("low")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = color_medium)
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = color_high)
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  )
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio
```
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
p <- ggplot(n_ratios) +
aes(x = n_east, y = n_ratio, color = method) +
geom_point() +
geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
ggh4x::facet_wrap2( ~ relevancy, strip = relevancy_strips, scales = "free") +
labs(
  title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
  subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de nQuery",
  x = "Sample size de nQuery",
  y = "Proportion"
) +
theme_minimal()

p
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

## Essai à 1 bras
### Results en exacte

```{r}
#| echo: false
bin_one_arm_exact <- get_tbl(ssc$bin$one_arm_exact$combined)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
n_ratios <-
  bin_one_arm_exact |> 
  drop_na(n_east, relevancy) |> 
  mutate(
    ahern = n_ahern/n_east,
  ) |> 
  select(-n_ahern)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio <-
  n_ratios |> 
  group_by(relevancy) |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(ahern, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(ahern, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(ahern, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(ahern, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(ahern, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(ahern, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |>
  gt(groupname_col = "relevancy") |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "Proportions A'Hern/East",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East"
  ) |> 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#ffa194ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("low")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#f0e292ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#a7ffc4ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  )
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio
```
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
ggplot(n_ratios) +
aes(x = n_east, y = ahern) +
geom_point() +
geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
facet_wrap(~relevancy, scale = "free") +
labs(
  title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
  subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East",
  x = "Sample size de East",
  y = "Proportion"
) +
theme_minimal()
```
:::
:::
:::
<!-- end columns -->

# Critères de type survie {data-stack-name="Survie"}

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 10
---
config:
  theme: neutral
---
flowchart TB
  AA[Time-to-Event Endpoints] --> AAA[Two-Arms]
    AAA --> AAAA([Fixed Design])
    AAA --> AAAB([Group-Sequential Design])
  AA --> AAB([One Arm])
```

## Rappel théorique rapide
### Paramètres requis

* Pour calculer le nombre d’événements :

  * $\alpha$ : erreur de type I
  * Puissance ($1-\beta$)
  * Hazard ratio (HR) : $\lambda_2/\lambda_1$

* Pour calculer la taille d’échantillon :

  * Probabilité de survie du groupe contrôle à un instant $t$
  * Durée d’inclusion (accrual)
  * Durée de suivi
  * Taux de pertes (dropout)

## Formule rapide (Schoenfeld)

$$
e = \frac{4 (z_{1-\alpha/2} + z_{1-\beta})^2}{(\log(HR))^2}
$$

* Autres formules : Freedman, Hsieh-Freedman

## De (e) à (n) : calcul de la taille d’échantillon
### Passage du nombre d’événements au nombre de patients

- Nombre d’événements requis : (e) (Schoenfeld ou autres formules)
- Pour obtenir la taille d’échantillon (n) :

::: {.fragment}
$$
n = \frac{e}{\text{probabilité d’événement dans l’étude}}
$$
:::

::: {.fragment}
- La probabilité d’événement dépend de :

  - Durée de suivi
  - Durée d’inclusion (accrual)
  - Taux de pertes (dropout)
:::

<!-- * **Méthode de Lakatos** :

  * Approche intégrant l’évolution des événements dans le temps
  * Ajuste (n) en fonction de la distribution du temps de suivi et de l’accrual
  * Permet de mieux gérer les plans séquentiels ou les essais à événements retardés -->

## Paramètres

| Paramètre                           | Valeurs testées         |
| ------------------------------------| ----------------------- |
| Survie contrôle à 3 ans $S_c(3)$    | 0.1, 0.3, 0.6, 0.9      |
| Hazard ratio $HR$                   | [0.1]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}, [0.5]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.7]{.bg style="--col :#a7ffc4ff"}, [0.9]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.99]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|
| $\alpha$ (2-sided)                  | [0.01]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.05]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.1]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.20]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [0.49]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|
| Puissance (1-$\beta$)               | [0.51]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}, [0.8]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.9]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [0.99]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}|

::: {style="font-size: 50%;"}
[pertinent]{.bg style="--col: #a7ffc4ff"}, [peu pertinant]{.bg style="--col: #f0e292ff"}, [cas limite]{.bg style="--col: #ffa194ff"}
:::

::: {style="font-size: 80%;"}
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}
- Période de recrutement de 3 ans  
- Suivi de 3 ans après le dernier admis   
- Proportion égale entre bras contrôle/expérimental
:::
::: {.column width="60%"}
::: {.fragment}
```{r}
ggplot()+
geom_segment(aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = 3, yend = 2))+
geom_segment(aes(x = 3, y = 2, xend = 6, yend = 2))+
annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 0, label = "Recrutement = 3") +
annotate("text", x = 4.5, y = 0, label = "Suivi minimum = 3") +
geom_segment(aes(x = 3, y = 0, xend = 3, yend = 2), linetype = "dashed")+
annotate("text", x = 3, y = -0.1, label = "Durée de l'étude = 6") +
geom_point(aes(x = 6, y = 2))+
labs(x = "Temps en année", y = "Nombre de patients") +
scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 3, 6),
    minor_breaks = 0:6,
  )  +
scale_y_continuous(
  breaks = NULL,
  minor_breaks = NULL,
  expand = c(0, 0.1)
) +
theme_classic()
```
:::
:::
::::
:::

## Essai à 2-Bras fixe
### Methods compared

| Critère | Type d'essai                  | Méthode    | Logiciels    | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Survie  | 2 bras, fixe                  | —          | East, nQuery | Rpact, Rashnu, gsDesign2            |


::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- East: Log Rank Test Given Accrual Duration and Study Duration [SU-2S-LRSD]
- nQuery : STT1 / Two Sample Log-Rank Test of Exponential Survival

:::

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeSurvival()
rashnu::lakatosSampleSize()
gsDesign2::fixed_design_ahr() # needs to define enroll_rate, fail_rate before
```

## Two-Arms fixed design
### Results

```{r}
#| echo: false
surv_fixed <- ssc$surv$fixed$combined
params <- get_params(surv_fixed)
tbl <- get_tbl(surv_fixed)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
n_ratios <-
  tbl |> 
  drop_na(n_east) |> 
  mutate(
    rpact = n_rpact/n_east,
    nquery = n_nquery/n_east,
    gsdesign2 = n_gsdesign2/n_east,
    rashnu = n_rashnu/n_east
  ) |> 
  select(-c("n_rpact", "n_nquery", "n_rashnu", "n_gsdesign2"), -starts_with("e_")) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("rpact", "nquery", "gsdesign2", "rashnu"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "n_ratio"
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio <-
  n_ratios |> 
  group_by(relevancy, method)  |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |> 
  gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East"
  ) |> 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |>  
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#ffa194ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("low")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#f0e292ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#a7ffc4ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio |> 
tab_options(
  table.width = pct(100),
  table.font.size = pct(45)
) 
```

## Two-Arms fixed design
### Results II

```{r}
ggplot(n_ratios) +
aes(x = n_east, y = n_ratio, color = method) +
geom_point() +
geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
facet_wrap( ~ relevancy, scales = "free") +
labs(
  title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
  subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East",
  x = "Sample size de East",
  y = "Proportion"
) +
theme_minimal()
```

## Two-Arms group sequential design
### Methods compared

| Critère | Type d'essai                  | Méthode    | Logiciels    | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Survie  | 2 bras, séquentiel en groupes | —          | East         | Rpact, gsDesign2                    |


::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- East: Log Rank Test Given Accrual Duration and Study Duration [SU-2S-LRSD]

:::

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
rpact::getSampleSizeSurvival()
gsDesign2::gs_design_ahr() # needs to define enroll_rate, fail_rate before
```

## Two-Arms group sequential design
### Results I

```{r}
#| echo: false
surv_gs <- ssc$surv$gs$combined
tbl <- get_tbl(surv_gs)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
n_ratios <-
  tbl |> 
  drop_na(n_east) |> 
  mutate(
    rpact = n_rpact/n_east,
    gsdesign2 = n_gsdesign2/n_east,
  ) |> 
  select(-c("n_rpact", "n_gsdesign2"), -starts_with("e_")) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("rpact", "gsdesign2"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "n_ratio"
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio <-
  n_ratios |> 
  group_by(relevancy, method)  |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |> 
  gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East"
  ) |> 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |>  
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#f0e292ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#a7ffc4ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio
```

## Two-Arms group sequential design
### Results II

```{r}
ggplot(n_ratios) +
aes(x = n_east, y = n_ratio, color = method) +
geom_point() +
geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
facet_wrap( ~ relevancy, scales = "free") +
labs(
  title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
  subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de East",
  x = "Sample size de East",
  y = "Proportion"
) +
theme_minimal()
```

## Two-Arms group sequential design
### Results III

```{r}
tbl  |>  
filter(
  alpha == 0.05, 
  power == 0.9, 
  hr == 0.6
) |> 
mutate(
  ratio_rpact = signif(n_rpact/n_east, digit = 3),
  ratio_gsdesign2 = signif(n_gsdesign2/n_east, digit = 3)
) |> 
select(-c(starts_with("e_"), relevancy, alpha, power, hr)) |> 
rename(
  "Survie à 3 ans" := surv_t,
  "Rpact" := n_rpact,
  "East" := n_east,
  "gsDesign2" := n_gsdesign2,
  "Rpact/East" := ratio_rpact,
  "gsDesign2/East" := ratio_gsdesign2
) |> 
gt() |> 
tab_header(
    title = "Sample Size dans des cas pertinents",
    subtitle = "α = 0.05, β = 0.1 et HR = 0.6"
) |> 
tab_spanner(
    label = "Sample Size",
    columns = c("Rpact", "East", "gsDesign2")
) |> 
tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#c1dae2ff")
    ),
    location = cells_body(
      columns = c("Rpact", "East", "gsDesign2")
    )
) |> 
tab_spanner(
    label = "Ratio",
    columns = c("Rpact/East", "gsDesign2/East")
) |> 
tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#c8e2c1ff")
    ),
    location = cells_body(
      columns = c("Rpact/East", "gsDesign2/East")
    )
  )
```

## One-Arm design
### Methods compared

| Critère | Type d'essai                  | Méthode    | Logiciels    | Package {{< fa brands r-project >}} |
| :------ | :---------------------------- | :--------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Survie  | 1 bras, fixe                  | —          | nQuery       | oa2s^[OneArm2stage], sssas^[SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival], Rashnu|

::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}

- nQuery : SOT1 / One Sample Log-Rank Test with Accrual

:::

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
OneArm2stage::phase2.TTE() # Version with accrual time
SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival::calcSampleSizeArcsine()
rashnu::oneSurvSampleSize()
```

## One-Arm design
### Results I

```{r}
surv_one_arm <- 
  get_tbl(ssc$surv$one_arm$combined) |> 
  filter(n_nquery < 200000)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
n_ratios <-
  surv_one_arm |> 
  drop_na(n_nquery) |> 
  mutate(
    oa2s = n_oa2s/n_nquery,
    rashnu = n_rashnu/n_nquery,
    sssas = n_sssas/n_nquery
  ) |> 
  select(-c("n_oa2s", "n_rashnu", "n_sssas"), -starts_with("e_")) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("oa2s", "rashnu", "sssas"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "n_ratio"
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio <-
  n_ratios |> 
  group_by(relevancy, method)  |> 
  summarise(
    Min = min(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Moyenne = mean(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Médiane = median(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), 
    Q3 = quantile(n_ratio, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(n_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., digit = 3))) |> 
  gt(rowname_col = c("method")) |> 
  tab_header(
    title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
    subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de nQuery"
  ) |> 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Pertinence") |>  
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#9A2515"),
      cell_text(style = "italic", color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = (Q1 < 0.9 | Q3 > 1.1)
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#ffa194ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("low")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#f0e292ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("medium")
  ) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#a7ffc4ff")
    ),
    location = cells_row_groups("high")
  ) |> 
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "OneArm2stage",
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "oa2s")
  ) |> 
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "SampleSizeSingleArmSurvival",
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "sssas")
  ) 
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
gt_ratio
```

## One-Arm design
### Results II

```{r}
ggplot(n_ratios) +
aes(x = n_nquery, y = n_ratio, color = method) +
geom_point() +
geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 1.1,  linetype = "dashed") +
facet_wrap( ~ relevancy, scales = "free") +
labs(
  title = "Proportions des sample sizes",
  subtitle = "En fonction des méthodes et de la pertinence des designs par rapport aux valeurs de nQuery",
  x = "Sample size de nQuery",
  y = "Proportion"
) +
theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
dt_one_arm <-
  surv_one_arm |> 
  rename(
    oa2s = n_oa2s,
    sssas = n_sssas,
    rashnu = n_rashnu,
    nquery = n_nquery
  ) |> 
  filter(
    alpha == 0.05,
    power == 0.9,
    hr == 0.7
  ) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("oa2s", "sssas", "rashnu", "nquery"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "N"
  )

ggplot(dt_one_arm) +
aes(x = as.factor(surv_t), y = N, color = method) +
geom_point() +
labs(
  title = "Sample Size en fonction de la survie à 3 ans",
  subtitle = "α = 0.05, β = 0.1 et HR = 0.6",
  x = "Survie à 3 ans",
  y = "Sample Size"
) +
theme_minimal()
```

# Annexe {data-name="Annexe"}
